headline: BIIB Inks Deal to Acquire Rights to Felzartamab in China, Stock Up
summary: Biogen gains after securing Greater China rights to felzartamab, giving it worldwide control as phase III studies advance in immune diseases.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid BIIB and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Biogen has had an impressive run over the past six months as its shares have beaten the S&P 500 by 19.7%. The stock now trades at $183.50, marking a 25.5% gain. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
